summary.finding: T11 already limited the bonus to no armor or light armor. This pass makes the modifier explicitly target walking speed and fixes sheet displays to read the derived walk-speed total instead of legacy system.speed.total.

runtimePath.aggregation: ModifierEngine.aggregateAll includes speed.walk; computeModifierBundle combines legacy speed.base and speed.walk into derived speed
runtimePath.sheetOutput: character sheet header and resources panel display derived walking speed

changes.change: Long Stride modifier target changed from speed.base to speed.walk and marked affectedMovementModes:['walk'].
Added speed.walk to static target breakdown and combined speed.walk with legacy speed.base only for character walking-speed total.
Added movement domain for speed.walk and clarified speed.base as legacy walking-speed support.
Mirrors derived.speed.walk and prefers it for identity speed display.
Combat/resource panel contexts prefer derived.speed.walk and expose base/adjustment display values.
Top-level sheet speed context prefers derived.speed.walk.
Combat snapshot now displays Walk Speed from the sheet speed context.
Combat Metrics now displays read-only Walk Speed total with base/adjustment note instead of editing system.speed using the derived total.

scopeNotes: This does not modify system.movement.fly, system.movement.climb, or system.movement.swim.
Legacy speed.base modifiers remain supported for armor penalties, encumbrance, and older data paths.
Long Stride still applies to static sheet walk speed only when the actor has no armor or light armor equipped. Medium/heavy armor causes the ARMOR_CATEGORY condition to fail.
validation: node --check passed for all changed JS files.
No Foundry runtime test was performed.
